title: rubus cladotrichus
intro: Rubus cladotrichus, also known as Japanese Wineberry or Yubari King, is a species of bramble native to East Asia. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Rubus cladotrichus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or supplement, and is also used in traditional East Asian medicine to treat various ailments.
